title: agropyron geniculatum
intro: Agropyron geniculatum, also known as crested wheatgrass, is a perennial grass species native to the steppes of Eurasia and North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. Creeping wheatgrass can be prepared as an herbal tea or supplement, and it is sometimes used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
